# GrowAssistant – Crop Steering v0.1.3 Release Notes Draft

GrowAssistant – Crop Steering v0.1.3 continues reducing the helper setup required for new installations by moving P1 state, shot counter, and last-shot timestamp state into integration-managed entities.

## Highlights

- Added integration-managed P1 state switches:
  - P1 Active
  - P1 Done
  - P1 Window Opened Today
- New users no longer need to manually create P1 `input_boolean` helpers.
- Added integration-managed shot counter number entities:
  - P1 Shots Done
  - P2 Shots Done
- New users no longer need to manually create `counter` helpers.
- Added managed Last Shot timestamp sensor.
- New users no longer need a `last_shot` `input_datetime` helper.
- Added services:
  - `set_last_shot_now`
  - `clear_last_shot`
- Optional shot engine blueprint now updates the managed Last Shot timestamp.
- Legacy `input_boolean`, `counter`, and `last_shot` `input_datetime` helper setups remain supported as migration/backward compatibility fallback.

## Compatibility

Existing legacy helper-based configurations remain supported as a migration and backward-compatibility path. New setups should use the integration-managed P1 state switches, shot counter number entities, and Last Shot timestamp sensor created by the integration.
